name: Brute Force
summary: Try every pair of lines and keep the largest area — O(n²).

lineExplanations.3: Get n, the number of vertical lines.
lineExplanations.4: Track the maximum area found so far.
lineExplanations.5: Outer loop: choose the left line i.
lineExplanations.6: Inner loop: choose a right line j to the right of i.
lineExplanations.7: Water height is limited by the shorter of lines i and j.
lineExplanations.8: Width is the distance between i and j.
lineExplanations.9: Area = height × width for this pair.
lineExplanations.10: Keep the larger of the current best and this area.
lineExplanations.11: Return the largest area found over all pairs.

syntaxExplanations.6: range(i + 1, n) starts just past i so each pair is tried once.
